title: TNEA 2026 Counselling - Admissions Open
content: B.Tech IT admissions through TNEA counselling. PSR Engineering College (Autonomous) — Affiliated to Anna University. Apply now!

title: TECHNOVANZA 2026 - Register Now!
content: Annual technical symposium scheduled for March 15-16, 2026 at PSR campus, Sevalpatti. Register your team before March 5.

title: Anna University End Semester Exams
content: End semester examination schedule for Even Semester 2025-26 has been published. Check the Anna University portal.
